generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance StepperMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded controller using TMC4671-Eval drivers for precise motion control of stepper motors in the gantry crane system, managing both cart movement and hoisting operations with digital and analog signal interfacing."
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic gripper mounted at the hoist end for container gripping/release operations, controlled via Arduino-based system with safety constraints implied by mechanical limits."
]

instance ArduinoControlInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Arduino-based hub aggregating sensor data and controlling actuators through digital/analog signals, interfacing with stepper motors and electromagnet for real-time crane operation."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision encoder measuring the swinging motion of the hoist in real-time for trajectory validation and kinematic modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement device providing environmental data for dynamic load calculations and operational safety validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

instance CranePositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional encoder system tracking the gantry crane's cart and hoist movements for real-time kinematic validation against the digital twin model."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionalData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance PositionalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder, SwingAngleEncoder, AnemometerSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model implementing forward/inverse kinematics for the gantry crane system, enabling trajectory planning and real-time position validation against sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicSimulationEnabler
]

instance CADGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the gantry crane structure including cart, hoist, and electromagnet components, used as the geometric foundation for visualization services."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SwingDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model predicting hoist swing behavior based on wind speed inputs (anemometer data) and motor control parameters for operational safety validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]

instance CraneStateDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous time-series dataset containing real-time operational parameters including positional encoders, swing angles, motor currents, and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingEnabler, ValidationEnabler
]

instance SensorCalibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Pre-processed sensor calibration parameters used to normalize raw measurements from encoders and anemometer for consistent model validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker-based containerization framework ensuring portable deployment of digital twin services across different environments with modular service isolation."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, OptimizationService, ValidationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating low-latency publish-subscribe communication between physical crane components and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService, PhysicalToVirtualInterface
]

instance TimescaleDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database optimized for high-frequency sensor data storage and real-time querying of crane operational metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService, ValidationService
]

instance KinematicSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic simulation engine implementing real-time trajectory prediction and validation against sensor data for control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, ValidationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization framework rendering the CAD model with real-time data overlays for operational monitoring and educational purposes."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing simulated kinematic behavior with real-time sensor data to detect anomalies and ensure system consistency."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance LoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Persistent logging service storing all operational data in TimescaleDB for historical analysis and trend identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time operational monitoring service tracking crane performance metrics including position, speed, and load conditions with historical data analysis capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:provides CranePerformanceInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematic optimization service providing trajectory planning and energy-efficient motion strategies for the gantry crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service ensuring the digital twin accurately reflects the physical system's state through real-time synchronization and fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemConsistencyInsight, FaultDetectionAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service displaying the crane's CAD model with real-time operational data overlays for educational and operational purposes."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing service aggregating and preprocessing sensor data before storage in TimescaleDB for analytics and validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedDataInsight
]

instance PhysicalToVirtualInterface : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bridge service connecting the physical crane controllers to the digital twin system, facilitating bidirectional data flow for real-time validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides InterfaceConsistencyInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CranePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time performance metrics including positional accuracy, operational speed, and load capacity trends for operational analysis."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated trajectory optimization recommendations minimizing movement errors, time consumption, or energy usage for crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation metrics comparing simulated kinematic behavior with real-time sensor data to ensure digital-physical system alignment."
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated anomaly detection identifying deviations or failures in physical system components (e.g., sensor drift, mechanical wear)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic 3D visualization of crane operations with real-time data overlays including speed, load, and positional metrics for operational monitoring."
]

instance ProcessedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Pre-processed sensor data insights including normalized measurements and calibrated parameters for analytics and validation services."
]

instance InterfaceConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics confirming consistent bidirectional data flow between physical crane components and digital twin models."
]

// C1: Environment
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment housing the gantry crane system with dedicated networking infrastructure for real-time data transmission."
    base:contains PhysicalGantryCrane
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Modular containerized digital twin deployment environment hosting all twin services and enablers with TimescaleDB database backend."
    base:contains DockerContainerization, MQTTMessageBroker, TimescaleDatabase
]

// C5: Components
instance PhysicalGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system comprising structural frame, stepper motor actuators, electromagnet gripper, and integrated sensing components for research and educational purposes."
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance ContainerMovementSubsystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Horizontal translation subsystem powered by stepper motor controlling the gantry cart movement with positional feedback from encoders."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalGantryCrane
]

instance HoistSubsystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vertical lifting subsystem including hoist motor, swing angle encoder, and electromagnet for container gripping/release operations."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalGantryCrane
]

// C12: Data Flows
instance CraneStateDataFlow : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:toData CraneStateDataInstance
    base:description "Continuous bidirectional data flow between physical crane sensors and digital twin models for real-time validation."
]

instance ModelValidationFlow : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryKinematicModel
    DTDFVocab:toData ValidationEnabler
    base:description "Kinematic model input to validation service for real-time behavior comparison against sensor data."
]

instance SensorDataProcessingFlow : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:toData DataProcessingService
    base:description "Data processing pipeline for aggregating and preprocessing sensor data before storage and validation."
]

instance CalibrationDataFlow : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorCalibrationData
    DTDFVocab:toData ValidationEnabler
    base:description "Calibration parameters flow to validation service for consistent model validation."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Control Application** (Python-based) receives commands from the **Trajectory Generator Service** and the **Human Machine Interface (HMI)** to control the physical crane via the **Physical Crane Interface**. The control flow includes:
- **Command Types**: Optimal movement trajectories generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, designed to eliminate residual swinging motion at the end of trajectories.
- **Control Message Formats**: Not explicitly specified; assumed to be structured commands compatible with the crane's controllers (e.g., position/velocity setpoints or trajectory parameters).
- **Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**: Not mentioned; no explicit validation or authentication protocols are described for commands.
- **Feedback Systems**: The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories (measured data) with simulated trajectories (from the **Simulation Service**) using distance metrics to assess performance. If thresholds are breached, alerts are sent via the **Dashboard**.
- **Conflict Resolution**: Not mentioned; no mechanisms described for handling conflicting commands or system states.
- **Command Execution Confirmation**: Not explicitly described; assumed to rely on the crane's controller feedback or implicit acknowledgment via the Physical Crane Interface.
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane Digital Twin system employs a **containerized microservices architecture** orchestrated via the **C4 Model**, with the digital twin decomposed into **six containers** (e.g., for data ingestion, simulation, and visualization). The system integrates an **MQTT Broker** for **real-time signaling between services**, ensuring low-latency communication. Resource management is implied through containerization (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes), though explicit orchestration tools (e.g., Kubernetes) are not mentioned. The constellation lacks a **commercial digital twin framework** (e.g., Siemens MindSphere, PTC ThingWorx) and instead relies on **ad-hoc integration** of components like the C4 Model and MQTT. No system-wide coordination mechanisms beyond containerized service interaction are detailed."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly outline detailed lifecycle stages for the Digital Twin systems (GreenhouseDT, Air Quality Management, or Lab Scale Gantry Crane). However, inferred lifecycle phases based on the context include:
  1. **Development Phase**: Utilizes virtual machines (GreenhouseDT) or containerization (implied for other exemplars) for deployment, with pre-recorded data for GreenhouseDT and AutomationML-based modeling for Air Quality Management.
  2. **Runtime Phase**: Features behavioral adaptation in GreenhouseDT (both physical and digital twin), runtime visualization (Air Quality Management), and simulation/prediction capabilities. The Air Quality Management exemplar leverages Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation.
  3. **Evolution Phase**: No explicit mention of lifecycle governance frameworks, but the use of GitHub repositories suggests version control and iterative updates. The ad-hoc approach implies manual or domain-specific evolution strategies without standardized governance.
  Transition management is not detailed, but the use of message brokers (e.g., ActiveMQ in GreenhouseDT) and sensor-driven feedback loops (e.g., Raspberry Pi in Air Quality Management) imply dynamic adaptation mechanisms.
  Transition governance appears implicit, relying on modular design (e.g., containerization) and domain-specific adjustments rather than formalized lifecycle management protocols."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system employs a **Continuous Validation Service** to ensure model fidelity by comparing real-time sensor measurements of executed trajectories with simulated trajectories generated by the kinematic model. The service calculates distance metrics between the two trajectories and enforces an **acceptable threshold** to validate operational accuracy. While the kinematic model underpins trajectory simulation, no explicit methods for uncertainty quantification (e.g., Monte Carlo simulations) or error correction (e.g., CRC checks) are described. Quality assurance relies on the alignment of simulated and real trajectories, though specific error tolerances (e.g., <5 mm or 2°) are not documented."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The digital twin's technical network infrastructure is centered around an **MQTT Broker** for inter-service communication, enabling low-latency signaling between containers (e.g., Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and Logging Application). Key details include:
- **Communication Protocols**: MQTT for service signaling; TimescaleDB for data storage (no explicit protocol for database communication mentioned).
- **Network Topology and Architecture**: Not explicitly described; assumed to be a local network connecting the physical crane, Python services, and the MQTT Broker/Dashboard.
- **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**: Not quantified; implied to be low-latency due to real-time control and validation requirements.
- **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**: Not mentioned; no redundancy or failover mechanisms described.
- **Security Protocols**: Not mentioned; no explicit security measures (e.g., TLS, authentication) for network communication are referenced.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is described implicitly through the **C4 Model containers** and technologies used:

- **Hosting Platforms**:
  - **On-Premise**: All services (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation) are deployed locally alongside the physical crane, suggesting a **single-site, closed-loop** deployment.
  - No mention of **cloud (e.g., AWS, Azure)** or **edge computing** (e.g., fog nodes).

- **Computational Requirements**:
  - **Trajectory Generator Service**: Requires computational resources for **kinematics modeling** and optimization (unspecified hardware specs).
  - **Simulation Service**: Likely demands **moderate CPU** for real-time physics simulations (e.g., crane dynamics).
  - **Continuous Validation Service**: Needs **comparison algorithms** (e.g., distance metrics) and **database querying** capabilities.
  - **MQTT Broker**: Minimal resources unless scaling to many clients.

- **Storage Requirements**:
  - **TimescaleDB**: Stores **time-series sensor data** and **trajectory logs**; no capacity specified but implied to grow with operational duration.
  - **Grafana Dashboard**: Stores **visualization metadata** (e.g., dashboard configurations).

- **Scalability Mechanisms**:
  - No explicit scalability features (e.g., horizontal pod autoscaling, sharding) are mentioned. Assumed to be **vertically scalable** (e.g., upgrading server hardware).
  - **MQTT Broker** could theoretically scale with additional brokers, but not implemented here.

- **Deployment Models Supported**:
  - **Monolithic Deployment**: All services (e.g., Control Application, Logging) are co-located on the same infrastructure as the physical crane.
  - **Containerized**: Services are abstracted as **C4 containers** (not Docker containers), implying **lightweight isolation** (e.g., process-based or virtual machine-based).

- **Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
  - **No redundancy**: Single points of failure exist (e.g., MQTT Broker, TimescaleDB).
  - **High Availability**: Not addressed; assumed to rely on **local network stability** and **physical crane reliability**.
  - **Backup/Restore**: Not mentioned; data persistence depends on TimescaleDB’s durability.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane Digital Twin system’s **horizontal integration** is limited to **internal service communication** via an **MQTT Broker** for signaling between its six containers. No explicit details are provided regarding **external system dependencies** (e.g., cloud platforms, enterprise systems, or other digital twins). While the system may theoretically integrate with external tools (e.g., for visualization or analytics), the documents do not specify **interoperability standards** (e.g., OPC UA, AutomationML) or **data exchange protocols** beyond the MQTT broker’s role. The architecture does not describe integration patterns with broader enterprise systems or other digital twins, focusing instead on **localized, containerized autonomy**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "
The Digital Twin system partially complies with **industry standards** but lacks comprehensive standardization frameworks. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar explicitly uses **AutomationML** (IEC 62714), a standardized exchange format for **product lifecycle management (PLM)** and **digital twin models**, ensuring interoperability with **construction engineering** tools. No other exemplars mention adherence to **IEC 62264 (enterprise-control system integration)**, **ISO/IEC 42010 (system engineering)**, or **OPC UA** for industrial IoT. Compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001 for security) or certification requirements (e.g., IEC 61508 for safety) are **not in Document**. Interoperability is achieved ad-hoc via **message brokers (ActiveMQ)** and **cloud platforms (Azure)**, but no formal **API standards** (e.g., RESTful, gRPC) or **data formats** (e.g., JSON-LD, RDF) are specified beyond AutomationML.
"
]
